sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1720" key="a)eri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀερίτης</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος,</foreign> kind of <sense id="n1720.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">precious stone</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
